items.title: Defending champion Alcaraz to miss French Open
items.summary: Two-time defending champion Carlos Alcaraz says he will miss next month's French Open with an ongoing wrist injury.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
